description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Book the highest-rated iPhone 12 screen repair under $200 within 10 miles of ZIP 10001
tasks.description: Find iPhone 12 screen repair services near ZIP 10001, filter to options within 10 miles, with ratings of at least 4.5 stars and prices under $200, then book an appointment with the highest-rated provider for a specific date and time.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main search bar in the header and type "iPhone 12 screen repair" into the search field.
Click the location field or location filter and type "10001" as the ZIP code, then apply the location.
Use the distance filter in the sidebar and set the maximum distance to "10 miles".
Use the rating filter and select only providers with ratings of "4.5 stars and up".
Locate the price filter for "Screen replacement" and set the maximum price to "$200".
Open the sort dropdown above the results and choose "Rating: High to Low".
Click on the first provider card in the sorted results list (the highest-rated option that matches the filters).
On the provider’s detail page, click the "Book Appointment" button.

In the booking form, select the 15th of the current month in the date picker, choose "3:00 PM" as the time, enter "Alex Smith" as the name, "555-123-4567" as the phone number, "alex@example.com" as the email, type "iPhone 12 screen cracked" in the notes field, and click the "Submit Booking Request" button.

tasks.name: Request the cheapest laptop battery replacement under $120 near San Francisco
tasks.description: Search for laptop battery replacement services near San Francisco, limit the distance to 25 miles, filter to services under $120, sort by lowest price, and send a quote request to the cheapest provider.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main search bar and type "laptop battery replacement" into the search field.
Click the location input, type "San Francisco, CA", and apply this location for the search.
Click the search button to view laptop battery replacement providers near San Francisco.
Use the distance filter and set the maximum distance to "25 miles".
Locate the price filter for "Battery replacement" and set the maximum price to "$120".
Open the sort dropdown above the results and select "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first provider card in the sorted results list (the cheapest option that matches the filters).
On the provider’s page, click the "Request Quote" or "Get Estimate" button.

In the quote request form, select "HP" from the laptop brand dropdown, type "Pavilion 15" in the model field, enter "Battery drains quickly and laptop shuts down at 30%" in the problem description box, fill in the name as "Jamie Lee", phone as "555-222-3344", email as "jamie@example.com", and click the "Send Request" button.

tasks.name: Compare two PS5 HDMI port repair services under $150 and save the one with the longest warranty
tasks.description: Find PlayStation 5 HDMI port repair services under $150, compare the first two providers that have at least 4 stars, identify which one offers the longest repair warranty, and add that provider to your saved/favorites list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main search bar and type "PlayStation 5 HDMI port repair" into the search field, then start the search.
Use the price filter for "HDMI port repair" and set the maximum price to "$150".
Use the rating filter and select providers with ratings of "4 stars and up".
In the results list, click the "Add to Compare" or similar compare checkbox on the first two provider listings.
Click the "Compare (2)" button or link that appears to open the comparison view for the two selected providers.
On the comparison page, identify which provider has the longest listed "Repair warranty" (e.g., more months of warranty) and click the "View Details" or provider name link for that provider.
On the selected provider’s detail page, click the "Save to Favorites" or "Add to Saved Providers" button.
If a small inline sign-in prompt appears, select the "Continue as Guest" or equivalent option (if available) to complete saving the provider without external authentication.

tasks.name: Request a home visit washing machine repair with no diagnostic fee available on Saturday after 5 PM within 20 miles
tasks.description: Find a washing machine repair service that offers at-home visits within 20 miles of a given ZIP code, is open on Saturdays after 5 PM, lists no diagnostic fee, and send a repair request to the first matching provider.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Open the service category menu and select the "Home Appliances" or equivalent category, then choose "Washing machine repair" if a subcategory is available.
Click the location field, type "60601" as the ZIP code, and apply this location.
Use the distance filter and set the maximum distance to "20 miles".
In the service type filters, select "On-site" or "Home visit" to show providers that come to your home.
Use the availability or hours filter to select providers that are "Open on Saturday" and also have closing time "After 5:00 PM" on Saturdays.
Locate the "Diagnostic fee" filter and select the option for "No diagnostic fee" or set the diagnostic fee maximum to "$0".
Sort the results by "Rating: High to Low" and click on the first provider card in the list.
On the provider’s detail page, click the "Request Home Visit" or "Book Service" button.

In the request form, select "Washing machine" as the appliance type, describe the issue as "Washer not draining and making loud noise", choose the upcoming Saturday at "6:00 PM" as the preferred time, enter the address "123 Test Street", city "Chicago", name "Taylor Brown", phone "555-789-1234", and click the "Submit Request" button.

tasks.name: Create an account and leave a 5-star review for a specific phone repair provider
tasks.description: Sign up for a basic user account on the site, search for the provider named "QuickFix Phone Repair", open its page, and submit a 5-star review with a short text comment for a smartphone repair visit.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Sign Up" or "Create Account" link in the header.
In the sign-up form, enter "Alex Test" in the name field, "alex.test@example.com" in the email field, "Test1234!" in the password field, and click the "Create Account" or "Sign Up" button.
After account creation, click on the main search bar and type "QuickFix Phone Repair" into the search field, then start the search.
In the search results, click on the provider listing with the name "QuickFix Phone Repair".
On the provider’s detail page, scroll to the reviews section and click the "Write a review" or "Add review" button.
In the review form, click on the fifth star in the star rating control to select a 5-star rating.
In the review text area, type "Service was fast, friendly, and my phone screen looks brand new." as the review comment.
In any visit type dropdown, select "Smartphone repair" or the closest relevant option, then click the "Submit Review" button.

tasks.name: Find a 24/7 emergency phone repair within 3 miles using map view and initiate a call
tasks.description: Use the map view to locate a 24/7 emergency smartphone repair provider within 3 miles of a specified ZIP code, then open its details and click the call button.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the location field, type "30301" as the ZIP code, and apply this as your location.
Click the "Map view" toggle or button to switch from list view to map-based results.
Use the service type filter and select "Smartphone repair" or the equivalent option.
Use the distance or radius control in the map filters and set the maximum distance to "3 miles".
Apply the "24/7" or "Emergency service" filter to show only providers that offer 24/7 support.
Sort the nearby providers (if a sort option is present alongside the map) by "Distance: Nearest first".
Click on the closest provider’s map pin or the first provider in the nearby list shown next to the map.
On the provider’s detail card or page that appears, click the "Call Now" or phone icon button to initiate a call to the provider.

tasks.name: Schedule a tablet charging port repair with free pickup under $90 in Seattle
tasks.description: Search for tablet charging port repair services in Seattle that offer free pickup and delivery, cost less than $90, have ratings of 4+ stars, then schedule a pickup on Friday between 9–11 AM with the cheapest matching provider.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main search bar and type "tablet charging port repair" into the search field, then start the search.
Click the location field, type "Seattle, WA", and apply this location.
In the service options filters, select "Pickup & delivery" and choose the option indicating "Free pickup" if separate options are available.
Locate the price filter for "Charging port repair" and set the maximum price to "$90".
Use the rating filter to select providers with ratings of "4 stars and up".
Sort the results by "Price: Low to High" and click on the first provider listing in the sorted list (the cheapest matching option).
On the provider’s detail page, click the "Schedule Pickup" or "Book Pickup" button.

In the scheduling form, select "Tablet" as the device type, choose "Samsung" from the brand dropdown, type "Charging port loose, charges only at certain angles" in the issue description, select the upcoming Friday as the pickup date, choose the "9:00 AM–11:00 AM" time window, fill in the name "Morgan Rivera", address "456 Example Ave", phone "555-666-7777", email "morgan@example.com", and click the "Confirm Pickup" button.

tasks.name: Contact the best-rated laptop data recovery service with free diagnostic and no-fix-no-fee under $400
tasks.description: Search for laptop data recovery services with free diagnostic and a no-fix-no-fee policy, limit the budget to $400, sort by rating, and send a message asking about recovery time to the highest-rated provider.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main search bar and type "laptop data recovery" into the search field, then start the search.
Use the price or budget filter for "Data recovery" and set the maximum price to "$400".
In the feature or benefits filters, select the checkbox for "Free diagnostic".
Select the checkbox for "No fix, no fee" in the same feature or benefits filters.
Use the rating filter to select providers with ratings of "4 stars and up".
Open the sort dropdown above the results and choose "Rating: High to Low".
Click on the first provider card in the sorted results list (the highest-rated provider that meets all filters).
On the provider’s detail page, click the "Send Message", "Contact Provider", or similar button.

In the contact form, enter the subject "Question about data recovery time", type the message "I have a laptop that will not boot and I need my documents recovered. What is the typical turnaround time and estimated cost under $400?" in the message field, fill in the name "Riley Chen", email "riley@example.com", phone "555-888-9999", and click the "Send Message" button.
